testcase.name: switchToWeb

error.message: invalid selector: Unable to locate an element with the xpath expression //input[@name='q] because of the following error: SyntaxError: Failed to execute 'evaluate' on 'Document': The string '//input[@name='q]' is not a valid XPath expression.
